title: BuildVision App — Login
description: Client login. Users set their own password on first sign-in.

description: Email forwarding, quick start, login credentials, and switching offices.

description: Per-provider forwarding steps for Gmail, Outlook on the web, and classic Outlook desktop, plus IT/admin external-forwarding fixes.

title: Email Forwarding — in-app SOP
description: The same guide embedded in the interactive Email Forwarding checklist.

title: Saved Credentials for Protected Links
description: How to add SharePoint / Google Drive / OneDrive credentials so protected documents resolve.

title: Access Other Offices
description: How users switch between a root account and child offices.

title: Quick Start for Manufacturer Reps
description: From home page to first sent bid in five steps (~10 min).

title: General Support
description: For client-facing issues during and after onboarding.

title: Welcome Package Template — PDF
description: Fillable welcome letter, team, account, quick-start, technical-setup checklist, support/escalation, and 90-day roadmap. Replace the [BRACKETED] fields from the Reference Sheet.

title: Client Reference Sheet
description: Per-client intake fields to capture before build. Fillable version lives on the dashboard.

title: Detailed SOP Checklist
description: Every step plus verification, phase by phase — the interactive sections in this app.

title: Process Gaps & Improvements
description: Documentation gaps flagged from the source, with suggested fixes.

title: Onboarding Training (schedule)
description: Calendar invite sent during QA & Handoff. Store the booking link/template here.
